name: methane snow storm
description: I'm in a methane snow storm
hints: You're lost in a methane snow storm. Navigation is tricky.
Some directions lead to other storm areas, some loop back.
Do NOT go WEST - that leads to the dead-end loop.
Head N, S, or E to navigate through. Avoid W at all costs.
notes: Methane snow storm area. W leads to dead-end loop room 20. Need space suit to survive.
